thread.title: South Africa's G20 presidency can be a force for good
thread.title_full: South Africa's G20 presidency can be a force for good

author: SUNDAY TIMES EDITORIAL
title: South Africa's G20 presidency can be a force for good
text:
Opinion South Africa's G20 presidency can be a force for good While the group has traditionally focused on economic matters, it has become accepted that this cannot exclude other pressing matters facing humanity 24 November 2024 - 00:00 By SUNDAY TIMES EDITORIAL
On December 1, South Africa will take over the presidency of the G20, a highly influential club of countries. G20 members account for more than 80% of the world's economy and more than 70% of global trade. They represent the world’s largest economies, including the US, China, Japan, France and Germany. ..
